Site Temporarily Unavailable

The New Mexico Department of Workforce Solutions is currently updating this website and will be unavailable, Thursday, June 9, from 6-7pm. We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience. The Unemployment Insurance (UI) Tax and Claims System is still available at https://www.jobs.state.nm.us/. If you have questions regarding UI, you may contact a Customer Service Agent in the Unemployment Insurance Operations Center at 1-877-664-6984, Monday through Friday from 7:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Employment services are available at New Mexico Workforce Connection Online System - https://www.jobs.state.nm.us
